_comment: PaperTrader config — edit thresholds and cities here. NEVER put real wallet keys here.
_sizing_note: Budget raised 500->2000 on 2026-06-20 (user request). Kelly sizing IS on: stake = bankroll * kelly_fraction * f_star, clamped to [min_stake,max_stake]. max_stake raised 25->100 (5% of bankroll) so high-conviction edges actually get allocated MORE than weak ones — previously the 25 cap flattened most bets to the same size. stake_per_bet (flat fallback when Kelly is off or edge<=0) scaled 5->20 to match the 4x bankroll.
_edge_threshold_note: Lowered from 7.0 to 5.0 on 2026-06-16 to generate paper-bet data faster (backtest showed too few qualifying edges at 7%). Revisit once 30+ paper bets exist to see if 5% holds up as well as 7% did. Revert by setting this back to 7.0.
_min_ask_note: M5 (2026-06-20): block YES bets when market ask < 5¢. All 5 first paper losses had asks of 0.1¢–4.1¢ — the market was correctly pricing near-zero probability and the ensemble's 'edge' was noise. This is the cheapest guard to add and alone would have blocked every loss.
_nbm_note: M5 (2026-06-20): NBM raw-member veto. If fewer than 3% of all ensemble members (GFS/ECMWF/ICON/GEM/UKMO) put the daily high in the bucket, block YES. This catches outlier-model edges: one model with high RMSE weight might show 20% but if 49/50 members say 0%, it's noise. Set 0 to disable.
_no_side_note: M4 (2026-06-20): allow NO-side bets where market ask > ensemble_prob + threshold AND ask <= no_longshot_max_ask. RAISED 0.15 -> 0.35 on 2026-06-21, backed by an OOS walk-forward cap sweep on the DEPLOYED path (no_longshot_raw — raw prob, calibration off): 0.15=12 bets/+11.1% ROI, 0.25=27/+13.4%, 0.30=42/+14.7%, 0.40=61/+22.0%, 0.50=69/+28.6%, 0.75+=73/+27.9% (plateau; nothing qualifies above ask~0.75). Win rate stays 90-100% across the range. Empirical optimum ~0.50, but stepped to 0.35 on purpose: single ~9-day heat regime with few losses (high variance), and fading mid-favorites (ask 0.4-0.5) is less theoretically grounded than fading longshots. The loss-driven YES guards (min_ask_for_yes, min_ensemble_prob, nbm veto) are UNCHANGED — this only widens the NO/fade side. Kelly sizes higher-ask NO bets smaller (f*=no_edge/ask) and max_exposure_pct caps total. Revisit toward 0.50 as more OOS regimes accumulate; revert to 0.15 to restore prior behaviour.
_brain_note: M3 (2026-06-20): Gemini Flash brain for Kelly sizing + veto. use_brain=false (off) until we trust it — engine rules are the hard gate, brain only sizes. Enable by setting use_brain=true AND setting GEMINI_API_KEY env var. Falls back to multiplier=1.0 if API unavailable.
_min_prob_note: Added 2026-06-20 (favorite-longshot guard, engine rule 6). The first 5 paper bets ALL lost; every one was a deep-tail bucket the ensemble itself gave only 0-13.5% (Miami 13.5, SF 8.6, NYC 6, Denver 5.1, Atlanta ~0). A 5pt edge over a 0.1% ask is illusory — you lose ~90%+ of the time. Gemini's 5 autopsies independently concluded the same. This floor blocks bets where the MODEL gives < 15% probability, focusing on buckets adjacent to the mean (where forecast skill is real) not the tails. Tunable: lower toward 10 once real winning data exists; set 0 to disable. This is currently the single biggest lever on win-rate.
_real_money_target_note: Set 2026-06-16: you said you plan to start real-money betting around two weeks from now. Shown as a countdown in `status` and the weekly digest. Update or remove if your plans change.
_cities_note: Auto-built 2026-06-16 from live Polymarket data via lib/cities.py (11 US cities, Fahrenheit highest-temp range/open-ended buckets only — Atlanta, Austin, Chicago, Dallas, Denver, Houston, LA, Miami, NYC, SF, Seattle). Polymarket also runs ~30+ more cities using Celsius + single-value buckets and/or LOWEST-temperature markets — not yet supported by lib/polymarket.py's bucket parser or the daily-high-only ensemble. Re-run `python papertrader.py cities --apply` after that support lands to pick those up too.
